entities.name: N5
entities.context: A system or process where meetings are processed.

entities.name: B-Blocks
entities.context: Elements extracted during the meeting identification process.

entities.name: Airtable Sync Script
entities.context: A script used for syncing data with Airtable.

entities.name: Cumulative Fields
entities.context: Fields in a database that are updated cumulatively.

entities.name: Audit Trail
entities.context: A record of changes made during the meeting process.

entities.name: Last Met Date
entities.context: A date that tracks the last meeting occurrence.

relationships.context: N5 uses scanner to identify meetings.
Scanner extracts B-Blocks during meeting identification.
B-Blocks are appended to the Airtable Sync Script.
Airtable Sync Script updates cumulative fields.
Cumulative fields update the audit trail.
Audit trail updates the last met date.
